name: JClaw
//: Read by VS Code Dev Containers, GitHub Codespaces, Cursor, JetBrains Gateway, and any other devcontainer-spec-compliant IDE. The base image (universal:2) ships Node.js, Python 3, multiple JDKs, and the standard CLI toolchain — enough for jclaw.sh setup to fire and surface clean errors for anything still missing (Play 1.x is a custom fork that needs a manual install; setup will print the install URL when check_play fails).
//features: Pin Java to JDK 25 (matches conf/application.conf java.source) and Node to LTS — both required by check_prereqs at setup time.
//postCreateCommand: Auto-runs the same setup script a human would invoke after a fresh clone. Wires git hooks, installs frontend deps, validates prereqs, and adds the github remote. Setup is idempotent, so re-running on container rebuild is harmless.
//forwardPorts: Backend on 9000, Nuxt dev server on 3000 — match the defaults in jclaw.sh's BACKEND_PORT / FRONTEND_PORT.
//customizations: VS Code / Cursor extensions that match the project's stack. Vue + TypeScript for the frontend; Java extension pack for the backend; ESLint + Stylelint for the lint-staged pre-commit hook.
